sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, random_data String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, randomString(10)), (2, randomString(20));
UPDATE test_strings SET random_data = randomString(15) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, randomString(5) AS random_str, length(random_str) AS str_length FROM numbers(3) FORMAT Vertical;
SELECT id, random_data FROM test_strings WHERE length(random_data) > 10 ORDER BY random_data DESC;
